title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: The following series RLC circuit with zero initial conditions is excited by a unit impulse function \(\delta(t)\). For \(t>0\), what is the voltage across the resistor?

Assume the opamp to be ideal. For a load \(R_L\) drawing 200 mA, the maximum power dissipation in \(Q_1\) (in Watts) is

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: In the JK flip-flop shown in the figure, when \( J = 1 \) and \( K = 0 \), what is the state of the flip-flop?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: For the closed-loop system shown, the transfer function \(\frac{E(s)}{R(s)}\) is ______.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text:
In the circuit shown, assume that the voltage drop across a forward-biased diode is 0.7 V. The thermal voltage \(V_t = \frac{KT}{q} = 25\text{ mV}\). The small signal input is \(v_i = V_P \cos(\omega t)\), where \(V_P = 100\text{ mV}\).

The bias current \(I_{DC}\) through the diodes is ________.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: A satellite attitude control system, as shown in the figure, has a plant with transfer function \(G(s) = \frac{1}{s^2}\) cascaded with a compensator \(C(s) = \frac{K(s+\alpha)}{s+4}\), where \(K\) and \(\alpha\) are positive real constants. In order for the closed-loop system to have poles at \(-1 \pm j\sqrt{3}\), the value of \(\alpha\) must be ______.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: In the AC circuit shown in the figure, \( R = X_L = 10 \\Omega \). To make the power factor \( \cos \varphi = 0.707 \), what is the value of \( X_C \)?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: The output voltage of a Cuk converter circuit is a function of the input voltage and the duty cycle of the switching signal, represented by the variable D (ranging in value from 0% to 100%), where \( D = \frac{t_{on}}{t_{on} + t_{off}} \). Based on this mathematical relationship, calculate the output voltage of this converter circuit at a duty cycle D = 75%, assuming an input voltage of 40 volts. The output voltage is ______ V.

title: EEE-Bench 子题 1
rewritten_question_text: In the voltage-divider biased amplifier circuit shown in figure, if the base bias resistor \( R_2 \) is accidentally open-circuited but the circuit still operates in the amplification state, how does the quiescent current \( I_{CQ} \) change?

title: EEE-Bench 子题 2
rewritten_question_text: In the voltage-divider biased amplifier circuit shown in figure, if the base bias resistor \( R_2 \) is accidentally open-circuited but the circuit still operates in the amplification state, how does the quiescent voltage \( U_{CEQ} \) change?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: In the figure shown, self-impedances of the two transmission lines are \(1.5j\,\text{p.u.}\) each, and \(Z_m = 0.5j\,\text{p.u.}\) is the mutual impedance. Bus voltages shown in the figure are in p.u. Given that \(\delta > 0\), what is the maximum steady-state real power that can be transferred in p.u. from Bus-1 to Bus-2?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Given the system block diagram shown in the image, calculate the steady-state error when the input signal is \( r(t) = 0.5t \).

rewritten_question_text: Two three-phase transformers are realized using single-phase transformers as shown in the figure. The phase difference (in degree) between voltages \( V_1 \) and \( V_2 \) is ______.

rewritten_question_text: In the circuit shown, A and B are the inputs and F is the output. What logic function does the circuit implement?

rewritten_question_text: Given image denotes a common-collector amplifier circuit. Calculate the approximate voltage gain (A_V) for the common-emitter amplifier circuit, as shown in the figure. The approximate voltage gain is ______.

rewritten_question_text: Consider the circuit shown in the image. Write the Boolean expression for \( f(x, y, z) \).

title: EEE-Bench 开放题 1
rewritten_question_text:
The figure below shows coils-1 and 2, with dot markings as shown, having 4000 and 6000 turns respectively. Both the coils have a rated current of 25 A. Coil-1 is excited with single phase, 400 V, 50 Hz supply.

What is the current in Coil-1? Answer in A.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题 2
rewritten_question_text:
The figure below shows coils-1 and 2, with dot markings as shown, having 4000 and 6000 turns respectively. Both the coils have a rated current of 25 A. Coil-1 is excited with single phase, 400 V, 50 Hz supply.

What is the current in Coil-2? Answer in A.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: The right figure is a schematic diagram of a step-down transformer in the left figure providing power to a user. \(R_0\) represents the total resistance of the transmission line, and the load at the user end is assumed to be a purely resistive device with total resistance \(R\). The transformer is ideal, the input voltage is constant, and the meters are ideal. When the number of appliances used by the user decreases, what happens to the voltage across the appliance \(R\)?
expected_answer: The voltage across the appliance \(R\) increases

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: In the given rectifier, the delay angle of the thyristor \(T_1\) measured from the positive going zero crossing of \(V_s\) is 30°. If the input voltage \(V_s\) is \(100\sin(100\pi t)\) V, what is the average voltage across \(R\) (in Volt) under steady-state?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text:
A unity feedback system is given as
\[
G(s) = \frac{K(1-s)}{s(s+3)}
\]
Among the provided root locus diagrams, which graph is correct for this system?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: The circuit shown is a current commutated DC-DC chopper where \( T_hM \) is the main SCR and \( T_hAux \) is the auxiliary SCR. The load current is constant at 10 A. \( T_hM \) is ON, and \( T_hAux \) is triggered at \( t = 0 \). During what time interval is \( T_hM \) turned OFF? Answer as a time interval in \( \mu\text{s} \).
